text.en: MS COCO changed visual recognition benchmarks by emphasizing objects in natural context, segmentation masks, captions, and everyday scenes. It supported detection, segmentation, captioning, and keypoint tasks in a shared ecosystem.
text.zh: MS COCO 通过强调自然上下文中的物体、分割掩码、图像字幕和日常场景，改变了视觉识别基准。它在同一生态中支持检测、分割、字幕生成和关键点任务。
